options.name: <slew_time>
options.description: Slew time (transition time) of the clock pins

options.name: <clock_list>
options.description: List of clocks only with ideal mode in the design

options.name: -fall
options.description: Falling edge of the register clock pins on which the slew time is asserted

options.name: -max
options.description: Clock slew time for maximum process corner slew time

options.name: -min
options.description: Clock slew time for minimum process corner slew time

options.name: -rise
options.description: Rising edge of the register clock pins on which the slew time is asserted
